== Notes for [[Item:Q111204|Q111204]] ==

----
===References
* https://ancestorium.com/tng/getperson.php?personID=I079065&tree=1 shows as son of Reccared I King of the Visigoths, d. Jun 601 & Bauda, cites
** https://fabpedigree.com/s008/f302010.htm '''unreliable source'''

[[Category:GEDCOM Notes Pages]][[Category:Pages]]
